mapper.select:
/* oms-master-owOrIf-sql-oracle.xml selectOrIfCount */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TORDER_INFO_IF_MAPPING A JOIN TORDER_MST_IF_SET B ON A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.EXTORDERTYPECD = B.EXTORDERTYPECD AND A.HDDTDIV = B.HDDTDIV JOIN TORDER_MST_EXTERN ME ON A.OWKEY = ME.OWKEY AND A.EXTORDERTYPECD = ME.EXTORDERTYPECD JOIN TORDER_MST_ORCD_DT DT ON A.HDDTDIV = DT.ORDERCOMDTKEY AND DT.ORDERCOMHDKEY = 'HDDTDIV' AND DT.LAKEY = #{lakey} JOIN TORDER_MST_OW O ON A.OWKEY = O.OWKEY WHERE 1=1
AND #{SEARCH_CONDITION}

/* oms-master-owOrIf-sql-oracle.xml selectOrIfCocolumn */ SELECT A.COLUMN_NAME AS FIELD1 , COALESCE(B.COMMENTS, A.COLUMN_NAME) AS FIELD2 FROM USER_TAB_COLUMNS A LEFT JOIN USER_COL_COMMENTS B ON A.TABLE_NAME = B.TABLE_NAME AND A.COLUMN_NAME = B.COLUMN_NAME WHERE A.TABLE_NAME = #{tableName} ORDER BY A.COLUMN_ID
